channel.title: jg on New Wayland
channel.description: Recent content in jg on New Wayland

item.title: Look Ma No Tax: From Zero to Full Employment
item.description: Demonstrating how the Job Guarantee precisely offsets the drain to savings

item.title: The UK Job Guarantee — how it gets paid
item.description: Why the UK tax and benefits infrastructure is ready to implement a full Job Guarantee for all.

item.title: How the Job Guarantee Fixes Mainstream Macro
item.description: Adding a Job Guarantee to the peer reviewed mainstream agent model

item.title: Adding a JG to the Baseline Model
item.description: Algorithm changes required to the Baseline Model to support a Job Guarantee

item.title: Labour Hours and Labour Services
item.description: Employment is about buying the former and generating the latter. How does that relate to the Job Guarantee?

item.title: Basic Income: Thief of Time
item.description: Basic income is a desire to be paid twice - once self consuming your own hours and once consuming the output of somebody else’s hours

item.title: Job Guarantee: Jobs for the People
item.description: How the Job Guarantee solves the matching problem
